results.description: A high-clarity user providing detailed, structured data across all logic model sections.
failures: turn 1: reply did not contain any of [captured, resources]

turnResults.user: We are starting the Green Haven Community Garden in West Philadelphia. Our goal is to serve local residents by reducing food insecurity and providing a green space for community building.
turnResults.reply: Thanks for sharing this. What materials and expertise support this work, in addition to your current staff and funding?
failures: reply did not contain any of [captured, resources]

turnResults.user: We have two part-time coordinators, $5,000 in seed grants, donated tools from the city, and a partnership with a local horticulture expert for training.
turnResults.reply: That's a fantastic set of resources to start with: two coordinators, initial funding, donated tools, and expert guidance for training. Great, I captured those resources. What activities do you run with them?

turnResults.user: We hold weekly planting workshops, maintain 20 raised beds, and run a bi-weekly harvest distribution stand.
turnResults.reply: Thank you for sharing those core activities. Thanks, I captured those activities. How do you ensure quality and fidelity?

turnResults.user: We maintain quality by using organic-only soil standards. For fidelity, we use a weekly checklist to ensure every bed is watered and weeded according to the garden manual.
turnResults.reply: That's a very clear system for maintaining both the quality of the garden and the consistency of your work. Great, I captured your quality and fidelity standards. What outcomes should we expect next?

turnResults.user: Short term, we want residents to learn basic gardening. Medium term, we expect 200lbs of produce per season. Long term, we hope to see a 10% decrease in reported food insecurity among regular members.
turnResults.reply: Thank you, that's a very clear progression from residents learning new skills to the garden producing food and ultimately reducing food insecurity. Great, this is complete. I captured the outcomes and can summarize the full logic model now.
